## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes and the architectural reasoning behind them.

## Type of Change
Select all applicable:
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix(scope):`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat(scope):`)
- [ ] Breaking structural change (`feat!` or `fix!`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs(scope):`)

## Maintainer Verification Checklist 
- [ ] My code successfully passes `make lint` and `make test` locally.
- [ ] I have not checked in any temporary artifacts, sandbox environments, or `.claude/` generated overrides.
- [ ] I have adhered to the One-Way Deterministic architecture.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` with relevant details representing this change.
